description: The spread of Turkic peoples from Central Asia across Eurasia and their establishment of numerous powerful empires from the 6th century CE onwards. This era encompasses major migrations, state formations, and cultural exchanges that shaped medieval and early modern history.

topics.title: Origins of the Turkic Peoples
topics.subtitle: Early Turkic tribes in the Altai Mountains and Central Asian steppes

topics.title: The First Turkic Khaganate
topics.subtitle: Foundation of the first major Turkic empire under Bumin Khan

topics.title: The Second Turkic Khaganate
topics.subtitle: Revival and expansion of Turkic power under Ilterish Khan

topics.title: The Khazar Khaganate
topics.subtitle: Turkic empire controlling the Pontic-Caspian steppe and Crimea

topics.title: Oghuz Migrations
topics.subtitle: Movement of Oghuz Turkic tribes westward toward Anatolia

topics.title: The Ghaznavid Empire
topics.subtitle: Turkish slave-soldiers establish empire in Afghanistan and northern India

topics.title: The Great Seljuk Empire
topics.subtitle: Oghuz Turks conquer Persia and establish vast Middle Eastern empire

topics.title: The Sultanate of Rum
topics.subtitle: Seljuk Turks establish kingdom in Anatolia after Manzikert

topics.title: The Khwarezmid Empire
topics.subtitle: Turkic dynasty rules Central Asia before Mongol conquest

topics.title: The Delhi Sultanate
topics.subtitle: Turkish military dynasties rule northern India

topics.title: The Golden Horde
topics.subtitle: Mongol-Turkic state dominates Eastern Europe and Russia

topics.title: The Mamluk Sultanate
topics.subtitle: Turkish and Circassian slave-soldiers rule Egypt and Syria

topics.title: Rise of the Ottomans
topics.subtitle: Small Anatolian beylik grows into major power

topics.title: Timurid Empire
topics.subtitle: Tamerlane's Turco-Mongol empire spans from India to Turkey

topics.title: The Ottoman Empire Peak
topics.subtitle: Ottoman expansion reaches its zenith under Suleiman the Magnificent

topics.title: The Safavid Empire
topics.subtitle: Turkic Qizilbash establish Shia Persian empire

topics.title: The Mughal Empire
topics.subtitle: Turco-Mongol dynasty establishes empire in the Indian subcontinent

topics.title: Turkic Khanates of Central Asia
topics.subtitle: Uzbek, Kazakh, and other Turkic states in post-Mongol Central Asia

topics.title: The Crimean Khanate
topics.subtitle: Last major Turkic successor state to the Golden Horde

topics.title: Legacy and Modern Turkic Peoples
topics.subtitle: Contemporary Turkic nations and the enduring impact of migrations
